form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 9th (10m 1) over 2100m at Ruakaka, well beaten by Kaipaki Jack (2:49.60) in 3yo+ on April 6 at $12.60. Showed ability the run before when he won by 1.5 m (10m 1) at this track (3:34.30) beating Busy Canoodling in 3yo+ on March 26 at $11.90. Could bounce back.
